src/main/java/ProblemSolving/TwoSums.jav.general_idea: Updated Javadoc comments to reflect a change in problem requirements from returning indices to returning the actual number pairs.
src/main/java/ProblemSolving/TwoSums.jav.human_impl: Changed Output examples from index arrays like [0,1] to value pairs like <[2,7]>.

src/main/java/ProblemSolving/TwoSums.jav.general_idea: Added specific marking criteria to the Javadoc to define expected time complexity and code quality weights.
src/main/java/ProblemSolving/TwoSums.jav.human_impl: Appended 'marking criteria' section listing code quality and O(n^2)/O(n) complexity percentages.

src/main/java/ProblemSolving/TwoSums.jav.general_idea: Corrected the assumption text in the Javadoc to refer to 'element' instead of 'input' for clarity.
src/main/java/ProblemSolving/TwoSums.jav.human_impl: Changed 'each input would have exactly one solution' to 'each element would have exactly one solution'.

pom.xml.general_idea: Switch Maven compiler configuration from source/target 8 to release 21 to target Java 21.
Pin JUnit Jupiter dependency to a specific modern version compatible with Java 21.
Upgrade Lombok dependency to a newer version.
Explicitly configure Lombok as an annotation processor path in the compiler plugin.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports the release flag and Java 21.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with modern JUnit and Java 21.
